title: Workstation Icons
description: Gives anvils, composters, grindstones and lecterns 2d item icons.
body:
This pack adds 2d icons for a few of the game's workstations, being the anvil (and its variants), composter, grindstone and lectern. These blocks were picked to sorta make it more of a consistent "rule" that complexly shaped workstations get shown as sprites rather than renders, and in the composter's case it was because I decided to drawn a parellel between it and the cauldron, with both of them being UI-less workstations and having similarly shaped recipes.

- the current version of the pack is compatible with 1.21.9 to 26.1.
